posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey I am trying to create a custom automation where I will remote API to fetch some data, I need my Recipe something like this

image1934×618 9.45 KB

In the above image there “is” when I click on it I show shows me 2 options

  • is
  • is not

I want to add that in my Recipe how to do that?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The field you need is called “status is something condition”

image710×284 10.9 KB
